name: analyze-and-report
description: Analyze source files then produce a summary report

list_files.prompt: Use the list_files tool to list all .mjs files in the current directory. Return just the filenames.

count_lines.prompt: Use the run_command tool to count total lines across all .mjs files in the current directory (use: wc -l *.mjs || find . -name '*.mjs' -exec cat {} + | wc -l). Return just the number.

search_todos.prompt: Use the search_files tool to find any TODO or FIXME comments in all files in the current directory. List each match with its filename and line.

summarize.prompt: Given the outputs from previous steps, write a short project health report covering: files found, total lines of code, and any TODO/FIXME items that need attention. Format it as markdown.
